overall.description: A cinematic drone shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a luxury rooftop villa with swimming pool and garden overlooking a futuristic city skyline during golden hour. The camera glides smoothly across the terrace highlighting modern architecture and lush vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury rooftop villa terrace with infinity pool

agents.ego_description: slowly flying across the rooftop terrace to showcase the luxury villa architecture and city views

entered.detail: Multi-level luxury residence with dark wood and glass facade featuring clean geometric lines
Rectangular infinity pool with turquoise water surrounded by white lounge chairs
Dark wooden pergola structure densely covered in green climbing vines
Tall tropical palm trees scattered along the rooftop perimeter
Futuristic high-rise towers and skyscrapers visible in the background haze

segments.scene_description: A smooth aerial drone shot glides across a luxurious Cyberpunk 2077 rooftop villa during golden hour. The modern villa building sits beside a pristine swimming pool, while a wooden trellis covered in ivy occupies the foreground. The futuristic city skyline rises in the background bathed in warm sunlight, with no people present in the serene terrace setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a smooth aerial glide across a luxury rooftop villa that transitions from an intimate garden setting to a wide vista of a futuristic skyline. It begins by drifting past a wooden trellis draped in lush ivy, which frames the foreground of the serene terrace. As the camera moves forward, the view opens up to reveal a pristine swimming pool situated beside the sleek, modern architecture of the villa. The scene then expands further, shifting focus toward the horizon where the massive city skyline rises, all bathed in the warm, golden light of the setting sun.
